title: Y@ruwshalem #3390
definition:
Jerusalem = "teaching of peace"

 1) the chief city of Palestine and capital of the united kingdom and
    the nation of Judah after the split
nasbUsage:

 1) the chief city of Palestine and capital of the united kingdom and
    the nation of Judah after the split

    NASB:  the capital city of all Isr.
